name: git
description: git — pure git plumbing commands that aren't tied to code logic. `/git:prune` removes merged branches and worktrees with hard data-loss guards (skips anything with uncommitted changes, stashes, unmerged commits, locks, or detached HEAD); `/git:tag-release` creates and pushes an annotated release tag. The code-aware loop (`/commit`, `/review`, `/sprint`) lives in the `code` plugin.
